title: Oracle AI World: 22 Fusion Agentic Applications and No-Code AI Agent Studio
summary: At Oracle AI World in London (March 24), Oracle unveiled 22 new Fusion Agentic Applications — AI agent teams embedded into Fusion Cloud for finance, HR, sales, and supply chain. Also announced: Agentic Applications Builder — a no-code environment for building AI agents with workflow orchestration, contextual memory, and ROI measurement.

title: APEX World 2026 Kicks Off March 26–27 in the Netherlands
summary: The 16th edition of APEX World takes place March 26–27 at ReeHorst, Ede, Netherlands. Four parallel tracks with keynotes from Marc Sewtz, Monica Godoy, Menno Hoogendijk, and Connor McDonald. Expected demos of APEX 26.1 features and APEXlang — a new text-based format for describing APEX applications, optimized for AI and version control.

title: Oracle brings MCP + AI tooling to modernize Oracle Forms into APEX
summary: Oracle officially introduced an MCP (Model Context Protocol) and AI-powered tool for automated Oracle Forms-to-APEX modernization. The approach drastically cuts the time needed to analyze forms, migrate business logic to the database, and build new APEX applications. With Forms 12c Premier Support ending in December 2026, this is a clear signal: it's time to modernize.

title: IBM closes $11B Confluent acquisition, betting on real-time data for AI agents
summary: IBM completed its $11 billion acquisition of Confluent, merging the data streaming leader with watsonx and hybrid cloud platforms. The goal: feed AI models and agents with real-time data streams. Combined with HashiCorp and DataStax, this forms a complete enterprise infrastructure stack: cloud automation, vector databases, and data streaming.
